top_signals.title: CVC Capital Partners Raises €3 billion for Mid-Market Fund
top_signals.summary: CVC Capital Partners Plc has raised about €3 billion ($3.4 billion) for a new mid-market buyout fund, expanding its private equity franchise into smaller deals.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Trump bought Apple, Nvidia and other tech giants before tariff reversal fueled rebound
top_signals.summary: The day before President Donald Trump walked back his tariff policy turned out to be one of his busiest days of 2025 for stock buying.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Mubadala Opens $25 Billion Credit Business to Outside Investors
top_signals.summary: Abu Dhabi’s Mubadala Investment Co. is opening up one of its largest investment businesses to outside investors for the first time, betting on its ability to attract institutional capital as demand for alternative lending rises.

top_signals.title: The World Cup sends prediction market volumes soaring to record highs
top_signals.summary: Trading volumes on Kalshi and Polymarket both hit record highs in June. Rothera, a new prediction market platform, was also able to manage $2 billion in volume.
